sourceSummary.oneLine: HAD1717MC/MG detector development completion report dated 2019. 10. 24.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports internal DHF/regulatory traceability for development completion, final specifications, reliability testing, design transfer documents, and certification budget planning.
keyPoints: Final specifications list a-Si TFT sensor, Gd2O2S:Tb scintillator for HAD1717MG, CsI:Tl scintillator for HAD1717MC, 3072 x 3072 pixel matrix, 1Gbps Ethernet, IPX4, AED mode, and maximum 50 W power consumption.
Reliability tests reported Pass results for environmental storage/operation, thermal shock, power on/off, repeated bright acquisition, drop, vibration, IPX4, and pressure testing.
Development target comparison states wired interface, acquisition time, dimensions, weight, external shock, waterproofing, DQE, MTF, noise, AED, and dual detector system results.
Budget sections mention Medical & Vet certification, GMP, CE, FDA, EMC/Safety, RoHS2, WEEE, UDI application, and representative contract costs.

Design transfer document list includes Spec Sheet, E-BOM, component approvals, mechanical drawings, electrical drawings, PCB Gerber file, firmware, FPGA RTL, manual, label specification, and incoming inspection standard.

evidence.claim: The document is titled HAD1717MC/MG development completion report and is dated 2019. 10. 24.
The report identifies the detector development team as the issuing team.
The product components include Data Cable, Trigger Cable, and Power Box.
evidence.evidenceText:
구성품 역할
Data Cable 24Pin Cable : Giga-E & Trigger Cable & Power Cable Integrated
Trigger Cable Communication Signal Cable : Detector & Generator & Hand Switch
Power Box 12V DC Power Supply & MUXing signals into a Data Cable

evidence.claim: HAD1717MG uses Gd2O2S:Tb scintillator and HAD1717MC uses CsI:Tl scintillator.
evidence.evidenceText:
Scintillator Type HAD1717MG : Gd2O2S: Tb
HAD1717MC : CsI: Tl -

evidence.claim: The detector final specification lists total pixel matrix as 3072 x 3072 and effective pixel matrix as 3052 x 3052.
evidence.evidenceText:
Total Pixel Matrix 3072 x 3072 Pixels
Effective Pixel Matrix 3052 x 3052 Pixels

evidence.claim: The detector final specification lists 1Gbps Ethernet data transfer.
The detector final specification lists IPX4 waterproofing.
The detector final specification lists Line Trigger Mode and AED Mode.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger mode Line Tigger Mode / AED Mode -

evidence.claim: Reliability test results report Pass for environmental, performance, drop, vibration, IP rating, and pressure tests.
evidence.evidenceText:
7. 신뢰성 Test 결과
구분 시험항목 시험조건 시험결과
일반동작 초기검사 초기 외관/기능 검사 Pass
환경시험
고온고습저장 시험 60℃ 80% / 603HR Pass
저온동작 시험 -10℃ / 16HR Pass
고온동작 시험 50℃ / 16HR Pass
저온저장 시험 -20℃ / 48HR Pass
고온저장 시험 70℃ / 48HR Pass
열충격 시험 -20℃ ⇔ 70℃ 30Cycle Pass

evidence.claim: Product drop testing was performed at 1m on wood board for 5 faces and 2 corners with Pass result.
The IP rating test condition was IPX4 and the result was Pass.
The development budget records CE and FDA certification spending.
Future required budget includes FDA certification review, UDI application, and representative contract costs.
Future required budget includes RoHS2 and WEEE certification costs.
The P/P progress result states zero process defects and 13 development issues completed or improved.
evidence.evidenceText:
10. P/P 진행 결과
- 공정 불량 0건, 개발 Issue 13건 개선 완료

evidence.claim: The design transfer document list recorded Pass results for Spec Sheet, E-BOM, component approvals, mechanical drawings, electrical drawings, PCB Gerber file, firmware, FPGA RTL, manual, label specification, and incoming inspection standard.

reviewFlags.reason: Revision or version is not present in the source text.
Authority is ambiguous: source metadata signals FDA, while the document text references CE, FDA, GMP, RoHS2, WEEE, EMC/Safety, UDI, and Korean SGS only in budget or certification-planning contexts.
Some extracted text appears to contain OCR or source spelling artifacts, including 'Line Tigger', 'PVB Gerber File', and 'MCU Fimware'.
DQE values may require review: final specifications list HAD1717MC DQE at 45% @0.1lp/mm, while the development target comparison lists CsI DQE at 55% or higher @0.1lp/mm.
